_provenance.note: Node-tree dump (extract/figma/dump.plugin.js, dump v1.4) for design→contract proposal. Single-set slice of cbds-plugin-all-sets.v14.dump.json: the owner's "Dialog" set, extracted verbatim (variants untouched); _degradations filtered to this set's nodePaths (v1.4 carries none for Dialog — min/max sizing is a v1.4 channel); _variables carried verbatim so the paste path imports with VALUES (captured layer).
